cross_impact_matrix.description: IEEPA tariff ruling increases trade uncertainty -> BOK rate hold to stabilize economy. BOK steady rates support exporters facing tariff shocks.
US tariff chaos drives Korea to diversify trade partners -> UAE mega-deal as alternative market. UAE deal partially offsets US trade risk.
i-SMR commercialization and energy transition roadmap are mutually reinforcing components of Korea's energy strategy.
SKT A.X K1 model is a direct manifestation of the AI sovereignty competition trend.
Coupang data breach expanding internationally (Taiwan) amplifies domestic financial/legal impact.
North Korean military threats drive Korea-Canada defense cooperation urgency.
Japan's demographic crisis parallels Korea's lone-death system launch -- both reflect East Asian population structural crisis.
i-SMR design approval drives investor interest in energy stocks (Doosan Enerbility).
Post-insurrection trial verdict shapes political landscape ahead of June 3 local elections.
Government ICT R&D budget 1.6T KRW supports development of models like A.X K1.
IMF criticism of Trump tariffs reinforces the systemic impact of the IEEPA ruling fallout.
UAE and Canada defense deals together represent K-defense's global expansion strategy.

emerging_themes.description: US Supreme Court IEEPA ruling, Trump's trade law workaround, and IMF criticism collectively signal a fundamental restructuring of the global trade order.
UAE 650B deal + Canada submarine bid + Korea-Canada defense agreement = K-defense entering a new era of multi-region arms exports.
SKT A.X K1, ICT R&D 1.6T budget, and national AI strategy reflect Korea's push for AI sovereignty.
i-SMR + Renewables 100GW + Investor capital inflow = Korea's energy transition gaining concrete momentum.
Kim Jong Un's nuclear threat escalation vs. peace process hopes create a volatile security paradox.

emerging_themes.theme: Data Privacy Crisis and Platform Economy Risk
emerging_themes.description: Coupang's 33.7M data breach and its international expansion demonstrate systemic risks in platform economies.
